title: Corporate Proclamation 137d

'''Corporate Proclamation 137d''' announced the political, economic, and military takeover of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]] by the [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]] in the early years of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]],<ref name="Strongholds" /> on the 62nd day of the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] year 8,494. The proclamation also announced SoroSuub's, and therefore Sullust's, support for the Empire and denouncement of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. The proclamation was rescinded in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], after Sullust became a founding member of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].
